title: Texas Pacific Land's Management Issues Coming To An End
text: The new Cooperation Agreement will allow major shareholders of Texas Pacific Land to vote freely and improve governance. Although two of the major promoters of the legal issues will retire soon, they haven't ceased the lawsuit. TPL has the best business model to gain exposure to the oil and gas markets, but I consider the stock to be overvalued with a current fair price of $1,433.

title: Black Gold And Vast Lands: The Texas Pacific Land Corp Story
text: Texas Pacific Land Corp is one of the largest land and mineral rights owners in the US, with access to natural resources. TPL has delivered impressive returns of around 31,000% since the turn of the century. The company's future growth opportunities include solar farms, wind farms, and other innovative land uses, while its main revenue source remains oil royalties.
